title: Authentication, Authorization, Tenant Isolation, and Privacy · Execution Trace: Feed Go Audit Redaction
summary: User IDs arrive in headers, handlers authorize by route presence, shared source data leaks private follows, audit logs capture tokens and reading history, and deletion scope is unclear. Predict the reader decision, feed or API contract, Go and PostgreSQL ownership, bounded failure, and observable evidence before reading the governing source. Planned artifact: Add and verify the feed go audit redaction increment in tenant-safe identity and privacy boundary. Learners progress through prediction,…
objectives: Record actor, decision, resource, outcome, and correlation evidence while redacting tokens, feed content, private URLs, SQL, and sensitive queries.
Minimize follows, read state, search, telemetry, retention, access, export, deletion, and support exposure by purpose.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
